basic_details.job_title: TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Relationship Manager (in the rank of Manager / Assistant Manager)
basic_details.short_information: TMB is recruiting Relationship Manager posts (Manager / Assistant Manager cadre) with Graduation / Post Graduation (First Class) qualification, last date 06 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be communicated individually by post / e-mail

application_fee.details: No application fee is required. The registration process is free of cost for all candidates.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be not more than 35 years as on 30-04-2026. Age relaxation details, if any, are as per Bank's policy and Government of India guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduation or Post Graduation in First Class (60% Marks) in any discipline under regular stream from a recognized University.
qualification.experience: At least 3 years of relevant experience in a Bank in sourcing / Processing loans / MSME Loans / retail loans.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of eligibility (30-04-2026). Only Indian Citizens are eligible to apply. Candidates should ensure they meet the experience and qualification criteria before applying. No vigilance case or adverse observation from RBI / Statutory Authority shall be pending against the candidate.

vacancy_details.Experience Required: At least 3 years of relevant experience in a Bank in sourcing / processing loans / MSME Loans / retail loans
At least 2 years of relevant experience in a Bank in sourcing / processing loans / MSME Loans / retail loans

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Bank norms (not specified in notification)

selection_process: Selection will be based on Personal Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be called for personal interview through Direct / Video Conferencing. The mode of interview

date and time will be communicated to eligible candidates individually by post / e-mail. The Bank reserves the right to reject any application or eliminate ineligible candidates at any point of time before
during or after the personal interview / selection. The decision of the Bank is final.

Applications will be scrutinized based on eligibility criteria. Shortlisted candidates will be communicated individually with interview details. No correspondence will be entertained regarding the shortlisting decision.
Shortlisted candidates must appear for a personal interview. The mode (Direct / Video Conferencing)
date and time will be communicated individually. Candidates are advised to keep their registered email ID and mobile number active throughout the process.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates should go through the detailed advertisement by clicking "Download Advertisement" available under "Recruitment Advertisement – Relationship Manager" on the TMB careers website. Candidates must have a valid personal email ID and contact number which should be kept active till completion of this recruitment project.
Documents Required to be Scanned and Uploaded (max 250 KB each):
Recent photograph with dimension of 390 x 520 pixels (preferred), max 120 KB (JPEG/JPG)
Signature (NOT in capital letters) with dimension of 240 x 240 pixels (preferred), max 60 KB
Self-attested photocopy of SSLC or Higher Secondary Mark Sheet / Transfer Certificate (for age proof)
Experience certificate/s and Relieving Letter for previous employments
Documents to be Produced at the time of Interview / Selection:
Interview Call Letter (communicated by post / e-mail) along with valid photo identity proof in original and self-attested photocopy
Original and photocopies of all educational qualification certificates and marksheets (Graduation / Post Graduation)
Original Experience certificates and Relieving Letters from previous employers
Any other documents as required by the Bank
important_instructions: Applications with incorrect / incomplete particulars or without required certificates attached are liable to be rejected. The Bank reserves the right to reject any application without assigning any reason; Bank's decision in the matter of eligibility, interview and selection will be final. The Bank reserves the right to eliminate ineligible candidates at any point of time before, during or after the personal interview / selection. The posting will be at Anywhere in India; the job role and location are subject to transfer based on requirements. Canvassing in any form will be a disqualification. The online application must be submitted on or before 06-06-2026. Candidates should note their unique Registration Number and Password for future reference - failure to do so will prevent them from proceeding further. A copy of the system-generated online application form will be sent to the registered email ID; candidates should take a printout for future reference. Any information found to be wrong or any candidate found ineligible at any stage of the process or later will result in disqualification. No correspondence regarding shortlisting, interview, or selection decisions will be entertained by the Bank.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications is 06 June 2026. Applications opened on 22 May 2026 via the official TMB Careers portal.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for TMB Relationship Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have Graduation or Post Graduation with First Class (60% marks) in regular, full-time stream from a recognized university. Distance/correspondence degrees are not eligible.

faq.question: Q3. How much experience is required for Manager and Assistant Manager cadre?
faq.answer: Manager Cadre: Minimum 3 years relevant banking experience in sourcing/processing loans, MSME loans, or retail loans Assistant Manager Cadre: Minimum 2 years similar banking experience

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be not more than 35 years as on 30 April 2026. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD is as per Government of India/Bank guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment?
faq.answer: No. The registration process is completely free (NIL fee) for all candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for TMB Relationship Manager posts?
faq.answer: Selection is based on Personal Interview (Direct or Video Conferencing). Applications are first shortlisted based on eligibility criteria, then shortlisted candidates are called for interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where will candidates be posted after selection?
faq.answer: Posting is Anywhere in India and the role is transferable based on bank requirements. Candidates must be willing to accept transfer.
